rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. SOPHIE LAU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 7, 2014, line 1.- PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIAS' Motion To Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver, And Impose Civil Penalties Plaintiff's Motion to Enforce Injunction, Appoint Receiver and Impose Civil Penalties is GRANTED as follows: (1) injunction is extended to July 28, 2017; (2) civil penalties imposed in the amount of $120,00; (3) Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees for and costs is granted in the amount of $23,578; (4) Defendants shall abate all outstanding NOVs by August 1, 2014; (5) Hearing re: appointment of receiver is continued to August 29, 2014. Defendant shall provide supplemental brief not to exceed 5 pages, excluding declarations and exhibits no later than August 12, 2014. Plaintiff shall submit a supplemental brief not to exceed 5 pages, excluding declarations and exhibits no later than August 21, 2014. = (501/REQ)

Defendant shall file and serve its demurrer forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTEN A. SADA, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. GARY Y. SADA, AS INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 7, 2014, line 6.- DEFENDANT GARY Y. SADA, AS INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support all causes for action. Marcia Sada's claims on behalf of the community are not barred by the pending dissolution case. Kristen and Geoffrey have standing to assert their claims. Contracts to be rescinded are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUTHER BURBANK SAVINGS, A FEDERALLY CHARTERED VS. WILHELMINA BEINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Regarding Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 7, 2014, line 7.- Order To Show Cause Regarding Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of Receiver OSC Re: Appointment of Receiver and Preliminary Injunction. Hearing Required. Defendant to provide evidence re: cure of defaults including ability to pay or payment of reinstatement on senior and junior loans; insurance; payment on utility liens. = (501/REQ)
